steps: Convert furlongs to yards: $354 \text{ furlongs} \times 220 \text{ yd/furlong} = 77{,}880 \text{ yd}$.
Convert yards to feet: $77{,}880 \text{ yd} \times 3 \text{ ft/yd} = 233{,}640 \text{ ft}$.
choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — '$306$': Far too small; likely from dividing instead of multiplying. ✗
  • Choice B — '$402$': Far too small; does not match any unit conversion. ✗
  • Choice C — '$25,960$': Result of multiplying $354 \times 220 \div 3$ (dividing by 3 instead of multiplying). ✗
  • Choice D — '$233,640$': $354 \times 220 \times 3 = 233{,}640$ ✓. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
